Bash(# Copy the current repo to new folder
cp -r D:/alexandria-cover-designer-latest D:/alexandria-biblical-cover-generator

# Remove old git history and start fresh
cd D:/alexandria-biblical-cover-generator
rm -rf .git
git init
git branch -M master

# Point to new repo
git remote add origin https://github.com/r-zeeshan/alexandria-biblical-cover-generator.git

echo "Done — new repo at D:/alexandria-biblical-cover-generator")

Bash("D:/alexandria-cover-designer-master/.venv/Scripts/python.exe" -c "
from PIL import Image
import os

base = 'D:/alexandria-cover-designer-master/Input Covers/'
dirs = os.listdir\(base\)
for d in sorted\(dirs\):
    path = os.path.join\(base, d\)
    files = [f for f in os.listdir\(path\) if f.endswith\('.jpg'\)]
    for f in files:
        fp = os.path.join\(path, f\)
        img = Image.open\(fp\)
        print\(f'{d[:40]}: {img.size} {img.mode}'\)
")

Bash("D:/alexandria-cover-designer-master/.venv/Scripts/python.exe" -c "
from PIL import Image
import numpy as np
img = Image.open\('D:/alexandria-biblical-cover-generator/config/cover_template_full.png'\)
print\('Mode:', img.mode\)
print\('Size:', img.size\)
arr = np.asarray\(img\)
print\('Array shape:', arr.shape\)
print\('Alpha channel unique values \(sample\):', sorted\(set\(arr[:,:,3].ravel\(\)\)\)[:10], '...'\)
opaque = \(arr[:,:,3] == 255\).sum\(\)
transparent = \(arr[:,:,3] == 0\).sum\(\)
partial = \(\(arr[:,:,3] > 0\) & \(arr[:,:,3] < 255\)\).sum\(\)
total = arr.shape[0] * arr.shape[1]
print\(f'Fully opaque \(template\): {opaque:,} \({100*opaque/total:.1f}%\)'\)
print\(f'Fully transparent \(content\): {transparent:,} \({100*transparent/total:.1f}%\)'\)
print\(f'Partial \(feathered boundary\): {partial:,} \({100*partial/total:.1f}%\)'\)
print\('File OK'\)
")
